title: Flaky Chicken Flatbread
description: A simple flatbread dish topped with flaky chicken and spices.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough and cut into 4-6 pieces.
Place the chicken breast on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chicken and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Bake the chicken in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, bake the flatbread in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
Assemble the flatbread by topping each piece with a slice of chicken, a sprinkle of dutch cheese, and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
